domain: Andean Inca khipu (Andes knot-based record-keeping cord; decimal positional system via knot-type × orientation × position; multi-modal encoding via color + fiber + weave-direction + ply-direction; selective access by khipu-kamayuk specialists untying/re-tying knots between deposit sections; top-to-bottom cord reading with category-gate decode)
specific_mechanism: KHIPU-GATE: position-bit-encoded context-gating attention. (1) Each context token i is assigned a small 4-8 bit category code c_i (analog of khipu cord color/fiber). (2) Per-layer L attention applies a category mask: token i attended only if c_i ∈ L.allowed_categories (low-bit subset selected per layer). (3) Position-decimal-knot encoding: token's within-category position uses a tiny 4-bit positional code participating in attention score via additive bias b(c_i, p_i). (4) Selective re-tie: prefill-time category promotion/demotion based on token saliency from cross-attention. (5) Inference KV-cache stores only (c_i, p_i, value) — bit-encoded compression.
llm_application: KHIPU-GATE for long-context LLM: per-token category-cord bit-code + layer-wise category-allowed gate + position-bit knot additive bias + selective re-tie promotion. Differs from SqueezeAttention 9HK2rHNAhd (2D layer + sequence KV budget — layer-wise but no category-bit gate). KVQuant NeurIPS 2024 (bit-encoded KV quantization — no category gate). RetrievalAttention qBpYqQUFPx (vector-search retrieval — no bit-category gate). TidalDecode ICLR 2025 (position-anchored selective KV — no multi-modal category). Differs from R435 BHUTANESE-GHO (binary classifier untouchable input), R444 SAMOAN-FALE (3-tier elevation mask), R412 BEDOUIN-MAJLIS (council deliberation), R397 BERBER-TIFINAGH (script-pattern context) by EXPLICIT BIT-ENCODED CATEGORY-CORD + LAYER-WISE GATING + POSITION-BIT KNOT.
novelty_claim: SqueezeAttention + KVQuant + RetrievalAttention + TidalDecode cover layer-wise + position-anchored KV gating paradigm. KHIPU-GATE adds (a) bit-encoded category-cord codes + (b) layer-wise category-allowed gating + (c) position-bit-knot additive attention bias + (d) selective prefill-time re-tie promotion. Recombination — bit-encoding + gating individually mainstream.
